data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of targeting past customers, but the evidence does not confirm that the system effectively identifies and sends offers to these customers. While the linked use case describes a scenario where past clients are targeted, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual targeting mechanism or the list of past customers being utilized. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement validation, as the evidence does not support the claim that the system is functioning as intended in this aspect.
gaps: No evidence of the mechanism used to target past customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
